tools.name: locate
tools.description: The owner's location — one tool, last-known or fresh by the `fresh` flag.

tools.name: location_history
tools.description: Recent location fixes, newest first. PRIVATE data.

tools.name: where_is_owner
tools.description: The owner's presence by ZONE (home/office/...) — the privacy-safe answer for

tools.name: zones
tools.description: List the defined geofence zones (name, center, radius, privacy tier).

tools.name: zone_add
tools.description: Define or update a geofence zone (e.g. 'office', 'parents'). Presence updates

tools.name: distance_between
tools.description: Geodesic distance in meters between two lat/lon points (PostGIS geography).

tools.name: dag_list
tools.description: List the org's composite DAGs (name, description, args, node count).

tools.name: dag_describe
tools.description: Full definition of one DAG: nodes, wiring, returns.

tools.name: dag_run
tools.description: Run a composite DAG by name. Independent nodes run in parallel;

tools.name: owner_presence
tools.description: Where things stand: last fix and zone presence fetched in parallel, then distance from the first defined zone computed from both. Demo of parallel + sequential wiring.
